pages.text: The $(item)Ruined Portal Skyseed$() — $(item)two obsidian$() over two $(item)gold ingots$(). A broken portal with a chest of Nether spoils.$(br2)$(bold)Where to look$()$(br)Gold comes off a $(item)Badlands$() isle; obsidian forms where water floods a lava pool.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.

A scorched basalt platform with a broken Nether portal frame and a loot chest. The reward worth the throw: $(item)crying obsidian$() — the seed of a respawn anchor, and otherwise unobtainable up here.

$(bold)Nether-adjacent spoils$()$(br)The chest holds the vanilla ruined-portal haul: golden gear, flint and steel, fire charges, obsidian and crying obsidian. Crafted from $(item)two obsidian$() and two $(item)gold ingots$().
